text: A career path
A turning point
To take stock
Fulfilling
To look back on
A milestone
To be passionate about
To come a long way
To juggle
Demanding
A fresh perspective
To thrive
Well-rounded
I have been taking stock of my life.
I have been learning English for a year.
She has been taking stock of her life.
We have been travelling since I retired.
He has been thriving in his new chapter.
Pricila, it is great to meet you. So, tell me, what have you been doing lately?
It is lovely to meet you too. Well, I have been taking stock of my life. After a long, demanding career as a dentist, I have reached a real turning point.
That sounds like a big change. What have you been filling your time with instead?
All sorts of things! I have been travelling, and I have been learning English, which is the most fulfilling part. I have come a long way already.
I love that. And when you look back on your career, what are you most proud of?
Building my own clinic was a real milestone. But honestly, I am most proud that I am still thriving and still curious about the world.

So, let me reintroduce myself properly. For most of my life I have been a dentist, and I have loved it. But lately, things have been changing. I have been taking stock of what really matters to me, and I have been slowly stepping back from the clinic. It has been a real turning point. These days I have been travelling more, I have been reading the books I never had time for, and I have been learning English, which has honestly been one of the most fulfilling things of all. I have come a long way, and I genuinely feel I am only just getting started.

I have known Pricila for over twenty years, and I can tell you, she has never been the type to sit still. She has been a brilliant dentist, of course, but that was only ever one chapter. Recently she has been reinventing herself completely. She has been travelling, she has been studying languages, and she has been picking up hobbies she never had time for before. People assume that when you reach this stage you wind down. Pricila is the opposite. She has been thriving, and she has come a long way from the shy young woman I first met all those years ago.
